expectations.text: Uses Bernoulli likelihood (pm.Bernoulli) with logit inverse-link function
expectations.evidence: pm.Bernoulli('churned', logit_p=logit_p, observed=y_data, dims='obs_id') uses logit_p parameter for logit inverse-link.

expectations.text: Standardizes or scales predictors before fitting the model
expectations.evidence: X = (X_raw - X_mean) / X_std — predictors are z-scored before model fitting.

expectations.text: Sets weakly informative priors on regression coefficients (Normal with sigma between 1 and 5)
expectations.evidence: pm.Normal('beta', mu=0, sigma=1.5, dims='predictors') — sigma=1.5 is within [1, 5].

expectations.text: Calls pm.sample() for MCMC inference without hardcoding chains (no chains=4 or similar)
Uses az.summary() or az.plot_trace() for convergence diagnostics
Reports 94% HDI (not 95% CI) for parameter estimates
expectations.evidence: az.summary(..., hdi_prob=0.94), forest plot with hdi_prob=0.94, az.hdi(prob_vals, hdi_prob=0.94).

expectations.text: Uses coords and dims in the PyMC model definition
expectations.evidence: coords dict defined and passed to pm.Model(coords=coords); dims used throughout.

expectations.text: Documents prior choices with justification comments in the code
expectations.evidence: Detailed justifications for intercept prior and coefficient priors with references to Gelman et al.

expectations.text: Uses a descriptive random seed (sum(map(ord, ...)) pattern or similar), not a magic number like 42
Runs calibration checks using ArviZ (plot_ppc_pit or similar), not custom plotting code
expectations.evidence: azp.plot_ppc_pit(idata) and azp.plot_ppc_pit(idata, loo_pit=True) — ArviZ plots library used.

expectations.text: Saves InferenceData to disk (idata.to_netcdf or similar) after sampling
